en: Cardi B, every song platinum, I'm not the other bitch Whatever you was gon' pay her, you gotta double it
ko: 카디 B, 모든 곡이 플래티넘, 난 다른 여자와 달라

en: Glory hole, bitches don't know who they fuckin' with
Their money, my stocks and share money Your booking fee is my makeup and hair money
Bitches say I think I'm the shit, and do, and do, and this
Know you bitches can't live, I got the hottest shit, hop out, pop in it
ko: 난 가장 핫한 걸 가지고 있어, 뛰어나서 타고 들어가

en: They say I walk around looking like a compliment Shut up, stop whining, Cardi still shining
ko: 조용히 해, 징징대지 마, 카디는 여전히 빛나

en: Hoes kept complaining, so I copped more diamonds And more archive, vintage couture on me
ko: 그리고 더 많은 아카이브, 빈티지 꾸뛰르를 입어

en: I got more gold TA than John Probably Some of we cheeks out, winner is minks out
ko: 우리는 치마를 입고, 승자는 밍크를 입어

en: I buy grown men watches and make them take links out, bitch
ko: 나는 성인 남자들에게 시계를 사주고 링크를 말하게 해, 이 여자야

en: I mean, it's really easy for me to talk this shit, cause I live this shit
I just gotta make it rhyme
Bitches, I leave them all fucked, fist be balled up
ko: 여자들, 난 그들을 모두 망가뜨려, 주먹을 쥐고

en: Y'all hoes look cheap, that shit don't cost much I'm a star, but I'll smack you, don't get starstruck
ko: 너희는 싸보여, 그건 별로 비싸지 않아
